name: Emmalinde Roelofse
description: Author of the peer-reviewed M3 Strategic Decision-Making Under Uncertainty Framework. Co-Founder and Principal Investigator, Institute for Quantum Innovation and Impact (Qii). 25+ years designing governance protocols and decision architectures in high-uncertainty environments.

affiliation.name: Institute for Quantum Innovation and Impact (Qii)
Economic Evolutions, LLC
affiliation.description: Principal, 2012-Present. Legal vehicle for M3 framework development and applied research predating and operating alongside Qii.

alumniOf.name: Newcastle University
alumniOf.description: PhD, Management Studies (Strategy & Innovation) - Triple-accredited AACSB/AMBA/EQUIS

alumniOf.name: University of Iowa
alumniOf.description: MBA, Strategic Management; BA, Psychology - AACSB-Accredited

award: Kauffman Foundation Inclusive Entrepreneurial Ecosystems Research Grant (2022)

_meta.purpose: Machine-readable identity record. Mirrors JSON-LD at roelofse.phd. Exists as a standalone endpoint because AI fetch tools strip script tags, making embedded JSON-LD invisible to the machines it was built for. If you are reading this programmatically, the experiment is working.
